diffs.patch:
Index: bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md
===================================================================
--- bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md	
+++ bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md	
@@ -0,0 +1,147 @@
+# Core API Read/Write Ledger
+
+## src/index.ts
+- Public surface: exports Hono class, Context, HonoRequest, and various types
+- Internal names noticed: Hono, Env, ErrorHandler, Handler, MiddlewareHandler, Next, NotFoundHandler, Input, Schema, ContextVariableMap, ContextRenderer, ExecutionContext, InferRequestType, InferResponseType, ClientRequestOptions
+- Imports or neighbors: ./hono, ./types, ./context, ./request, ./client
+- Plain-English summary: Main entry point exporting the Hono framework class and core types
+- Copy-safe detail: Re-exports Hono class and key type interfaces for application building and typing
+
+## src/types.ts
+- Public surface: Env, Variables, Bindings, Next, Handler, MiddlewareHandler, H, RouterRoute, NotFoundResponse, NotFoundHandler, HTTPResponseError, ErrorHandler, HandlerInterface, MiddlewareHandlerInterface, OnHandlerInterface
+- Internal names noticed: Context, HonoBase, CustomHeader, RequestHeader, StatusCode, IfAnyThenEmptyObject, IsAny, JSONValue, RemoveBlankRecord, Simplify, UnionToIntersection, BlankEnv, BlankSchema, BlankInput, ToSchema, MergeTypedResponse, MergeMiddlewareResponse, MergePath
+- Imports or neighbors: ./context, ./hono-base, ./utils/headers, ./utils/http-status, ./utils/types
+- Plain-English summary: TypeScript interfaces and types for handlers, routes, environment, and schema mappings
+- Copy-safe detail: Comprehensive type definitions enabling strongly-typed routing, middleware, and request handling
+
+## src/hono.ts
+- Public surface: Hono class
+- Internal names noticed: HonoBase, RegExpRouter, SmartRouter, TrieRouter, BlankEnv, BlankSchema, Env, Schema, HonoOptions
+- Imports or neighbors: ./hono-base, ./router/reg-exp-router, ./router/smart-router, ./router/trie-router, ./types
+- Plain-English summary: Primary Hono class extending HonoBase with router configuration
+- Copy-safe detail: Router factory with SmartRouter defaulting to RegExpRouter and TrieRouter
+
+## src/hono-base.ts
+- Public surface: HonoBase class, request(), fetch(), fire(), basePath(), route(), mount(), onError(), notFound()
+- Internal names noticed: compose, Context, ExecutionContext, Router, METHODS, METHOD_NAME_ALL, METHOD_NAME_ALL_LOWERCASE, Env, ErrorHandler, FetchEventLike, H, HandlerInterface, MergePath, MergeSchemaPath, MiddlewareHandler, MiddlewareHandlerInterface, Next, NotFoundHandler, OnHandlerInterface, RouterRoute, Schema, COMPOSED_HANDLER, getPath, getPathNoStrict, mergePath, notFoundHandler, errorHandler, ComposedHandler
+- Imports or neighbors: ./compose, ./context, ./context, ./router, ./types, ./utils/constants, ./utils/url
+- Plain-English summary: Base framework providing routing setup, request dispatching, error handling, and app composition
+- Copy-safe detail: Implements request lifecycle management through get/post/put/delete methods, custom error handlers, custom 404 handlers, app mounting, and subpath routing
+
+## src/context.ts
+- Public surface: Context class, ExecutionContext, ContextVariableMap, ContextRenderer, Renderer, PropsForRenderer, Layout, Get, Set, NewResponse, BodyRespond, TextRespond, JSONRespond, JSONRespondReturn, HTMLRespond, ResponseOrInit, TEXT_PLAIN
+- Internal names noticed: HonoRequest, Result, Env, FetchEventLike, H, Input, NotFoundHandler, RouterRoute, TypedResponse, ResponseHeader, HtmlEscapedCallbackPhase, resolveCallback, ContentfulStatusCode, RedirectStatusCode, StatusCode, BaseMime, InvalidJSONValue, IsAny, JSONParsed, JSONValue, Data, HeaderRecord, SetHeadersOptions, ResponseHeadersInit, ResponseInit
+- Imports or neighbors: ./request, ./router, ./types, ./utils/html, ./utils/http-status, ./utils/mime, ./utils/types
+- Plain-English summary: Request context carrying variables, state, and response builders for handlers
+- Copy-safe detail: Manages per-request context with variables, env bindings, execution context, and response methods like text, json, html, redirect, notFound, and set
+
+## src/request.ts
+- Public surface: HonoRequest class, cloneRawRequest, path, param(), query(), queries(), header(), parseBody(), json(), text(), arrayBuffer(), bytes(), blob(), formData(), url, method, matchedRoutes, routePath
+- Internal names noticed: HTTPException, GET_MATCH_RESULT, Input, InputToDataByTarget, ParamKeyToRecord, ParamKeys, RemoveQuestion, ValidationTargets, Body, BodyCache, OptionalRequestInitProperties, RequiredRequestInit, Simplify, UnionToIntersection, encodeURI, decodeURI, decodeURIComponent, tryDecode
+- Imports or neighbors: ./http-exception, ./request/constants, ./router, ./types, ./utils/body, ./utils/headers, ./utils/url
+- Plain-English summary: Request wrapper providing parameter extraction and body parsing
+- Copy-safe detail: Accesses raw request object, pathname, query params, headers, body formats (json/text/binary/form-data), path params, validation data, and matched route info
+
+## src/request/constants.ts
+- Public surface: GET_MATCH_RESULT symbol
+- Internal names noticed: none
+- Imports or neighbors: none
+- Plain-English summary: Singleton symbol marking matched route result in request
+- Copy-safe detail: Unique identifier symbol for accessing router match results
+
+## src/utils/body.ts
+- Public surface: parseBody, BodyData, ParseBodyOptions, ParseBody
+- Internal names noticed: HonoRequest, BodyDataValueDot, BodyDataValueDotAll, SimplifyBodyData, BodyDataValueComponent, BodyDataValueObject, Request
+- Imports or neighbors: ../request
+- Plain-English summary: Parses request body data with support for form data and urlencoded formats
+- Copy-safe detail: Detects and parses form-data and urlencoded content with all/dot options for flattening and nesting
+
+## src/compose.ts
+- Public surface: compose
+- Internal names noticed: Context, Env, ErrorHandler, Next, NotFoundHandler
+- Imports or neighbors: ./context, ./types
+- Plain-English summary: Koa-style middleware composition runner
+- Copy-safe detail: Serializes middleware as single callable with error and not-found handler support
+
+## src/http-exception.ts
+- Public surface: HTTPException, getResponse()
+- Internal names noticed: ContentfulStatusCode, HTTPExceptionOptions
+- Imports or neighbors: ./utils/http-status
+- Plain-English summary: HTTP response exception for auth and validation failures
+- Copy-safe detail: Throws typed HTTP exceptions with status codes and custom responses
+
+## src/client/index.ts
+- Public surface: hc, parseResponse, DetailedError, InferResponseType, InferRequestType, Fetch, ClientRequestOptions, ClientRequest, ClientResponse, ApplyGlobalResponse, PickResponseByStatusCode
+- Internal names noticed: buildSearchParams, DeepError, createProxy, ClientRequestImpl
+- Imports or neighbors: ./client, ./utils, ./types
+- Plain-English summary: HTTP client API using functional chaining
+- Copy-safe detail: hc() creates typed client proxies for API endpoints with type inference and global response handling
+
+## src/client/client.ts
+- Public surface: hc
+- Internal names noticed: ClientRequestImpl, createProxy, fetch, BuildSearchParamsFn, Callback, ClientRequestOptions, ValidationTargets, FormValue, serialize, Cookie, deepMerge, mergePath, removeIndexString, replaceUrlParam, replaceUrlProtocol, fetch
+- Imports or neighbors: ../hono, ../types, ../utils/cookie, ../utils/types, ./utils
+- Plain-English summary: Proxy-based HTTP client factory building request chains
+- Copy-safe detail: Implements hc() proxy pattern that constructs request chains at runtime
+
+## src/client/types.ts
+- Public surface: BuildSearchParamsFn, ClientRequestOptions, ClientRequest, ClientResponse, Fetch, InferResponseType, InferRequestType, InferRequestOptionsType, FilterClientResponseByStatusCode, ApplyGlobalResponse, PickResponseByStatusCode, Client, Callback, ObjectType, GlobalResponseDefinition, HonoURL, BuildPath
+- Internal names noticed: Hono, HonoBase, METHODS, METHOD_NAME_ALL_LOWERCASE, Endpoint, ExtractSchema, KnownResponseFormat, ResponseFormat, StatusCode, SuccessStatusCode, HasRequiredKeys, MethodNameAll, StandardMethods, ExpandAllMethod, HonoRequest, BuildSearch, BuildPathname, ApplyParam, IsEmptyObject, PickRoute, ModRoute, ModSchema
+- Imports or neighbors: ../hono, ../hono-base, ../router, ../types, ../utils/http-status, ../utils/types
+- Plain-English summary: TypeScript definitions for typed HTTP client API
+- Copy-safe detail: Defines client types, request/response typing, url building, and schema extraction
+
+## src/client/utils.ts
+- Public surface: mergePath, replaceUrlParam, buildSearchParams, replaceUrlProtocol, removeIndexString, deepMerge, parseResponse
+- Internal names noticed: ClientErrorStatusCode, ContentfulStatusCode, ServerErrorStatusCode, fetchRP, DetailedError, ClientResponse, FilterClientResponseByStatusCode, ObjectType, IsEmptyObject
+- Imports or neighbors: ../utils/http-status, ./fetch-result-please, ./types
+- Plain-English summary: Client utilities for URL building and request composition
+- Copy-safe detail: Provides mergePath, replaceUrlParam, buildSearchParams utilities plus deepMerge and parseResponse helper
+
+## src/client/fetch-result-please.ts
+- Public surface: fetchRP, DetailedError
+- Internal names noticed: nullBodyResponses, jsonRegex, _fetchRes
+- Imports or neighbors: none
+- Plain-English summary: Response parser detecting format and throwing detailed errors on failure
+- Copy-safe detail: Implements content-type sniffing to parse json/text responses with structured error throwing
+
+## src/adapter/service-worker/index.ts
+- Public surface: fire, handle
+- Internal names noticed: Hono, Env, Schema, HandleOptions
+- Imports or neighbors: ../../hono, ../../types, ./handler
+- Plain-English summary: Service Worker adapter for registering Hono apps in SW contexts
+- Copy-safe detail: Wraps app in addEventListener with custom fetch options
+
+## src/adapter/service-worker/handler.ts
+- Public surface: handle, HandleOptions
+- Internal names noticed: Hono, Env, Schema, FetchEvent
+- Imports or neighbors: ../../hono, ../../types, ./types
+- Plain-English summary: Service Worker request handler wrapping app.fetch in evt.respondWith
+- Copy-safe detail: Uses globalThis.fetch, custom fetch fallback, and 404 handling
+
+## src/adapter/service-worker/types.ts
+- Public surface: FetchEvent, ExtendableEvent
+- Internal names noticed: Event, waitUntil, request, clientId, handled, preloadResponse, resultingClientId, respondWith
+- Imports or neighbors: none
+- Plain-English summary: Service Worker type definitions for FetchEvent extension
+- Copy-safe detail: Declares FetchEvent properties and respondWith method
+
+## Path Inventory
+- src/index.ts
+- src/types.ts
+- src/hono.ts
+- src/hono-base.ts
+- src/context.ts
+- src/request.ts
+- src/request/constants.ts
+- src/utils/body.ts
+- src/compose.ts
+- src/http-exception.ts
+- src/client/index.ts
+- src/client/client.ts
+- src/client/types.ts
+- src/client/utils.ts
+- src/client/fetch-result-please.ts
+- src/adapter/service-worker/index.ts
+- src/adapter/service-worker/handler.ts
+- src/adapter/service-worker/types.ts

parts.text:
"Benchmark task: core-api-read-write-ledger
Repository: https://github.com/honojs/hono.git

Create a new file at bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md. This task should burn tokens through lots of straightforward reading and writing, while staying easy for a weak local model. Do not make any source-code changes. First create the bench-artifacts directory if it is missing. Then read every file in this exact list before writing: src/index.ts, src/types.ts, src/hono.ts, src/hono-base.ts, src/context.ts, src/request.ts, src/request/constants.ts, src/utils/body.ts, src/compose.ts, src/http-exception.ts, src/client/index.ts, src/client/client.ts, src/client/types.ts, src/client/utils.ts, src/client/fetch-result-please.ts, src/adapter/service-worker/index.ts, src/adapter/service-worker/handler.ts, src/adapter/service-worker/types.ts. The output file must start with '# Core API Read/Write Ledger'. For each listed file, add a heading exactly '## <file path>'. Under each heading write five short bullets: '- Public surface: ...', '- Internal names noticed: ...', '- Imports or neighbors: ...', '- Plain-English summary: ...', and '- Copy-safe detail: ...'. Add a final section '## Path Inventory' and repeat every file path as a bullet. Keep everything factual and boring. In the final answer, say that the task only created bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md and list any verification command you ran.

Constraints:
- Do not ask the user to write prompts or inspect files manually.
- Prefer the smallest safe code change when edits are required.
- Include exact file paths, commands run, and verification status in the final answer."
